name: Tomato and Mozzarella
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the tomatoes, but do not peel them. Cut into thin slices and keep them together.
2. Cut the mozzarella into thin slices.
3. Arrange on individual plates, alternating tomato and cheese slices, packing tightly to form a roll. Allow one tomato slice and about half a cheese slice per person.
4. Pour the dressing over the top.
5. Decorate with a few leaves of basil.
